findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get your user a free Aimnis API key (no credit card, takes one call). Ask your user for their email address first. The key comes back in this tool result — rela…
